text_preview:
## TELEX communication informing the sightings of the same UFO by two brazilian ships at high seas.

## “On August 12, 1986, the Brazilian ship RENATA / PPWY, informed having had visual contact with an unidentified flying object in the Northwest position of the ship, position of which is LAT. 18.40S / LONG. 38.50W, sighting that was communicated to VITÓRIA RADIO / PPV by the also Brazilian ship PATRÍCIA RAMOS / PPLT shortly after the RENATA / PPWY report, informing the vessels that the “UFO” was of a circular shape wrapped in bright blue cloudiness, having followed the north course with high s
summary: Telex from August 12, 1986 reports two Brazilian ships at sea (position 18.40S/38.50W) both visually observed a circular blue-glowing UFO heading north at high speed for ~10 minutes.
